title: Semiconductor sector faces broad valuation reset
summary: Analysts across Wall Street are reassessing semiconductor valuations after a prolonged AI-driven rally. NVDA, AMD, and INTC all saw pressure as price-to-earnings multiples came under scrutiny.

title: AI trade expectations moderate after Fed commentary
summary: Federal Reserve officials signaled a cautious stance on rate cuts, dampening risk appetite. AI-linked equities including NVDA saw selling pressure as investors rotated to defensive positions.

title: Analyst downgrades NVDA on near-term supply chain concerns
summary: A Morgan Stanley analyst lowered their near-term price target for NVDA citing potential supply chain bottlenecks for next-gen GPU components, though the long-term thesis remains intact.

title: Apple faces regulatory headwinds in EU
summary: The European Union opened a new antitrust investigation into Apple's App Store practices, adding regulatory uncertainty to the stock's near-term outlook.

title: Tesla delivery numbers disappoint for Q1
summary: Tesla's preliminary Q1 delivery figures came in below analyst consensus, raising concerns about demand softness in key markets including China and Europe.

title: Broad market pullback on inflation data
summary: The S&P 500 declined 1.2% after CPI data came in slightly above expectations, reigniting concerns about the Fed's rate path and compressing equity multiples across sectors.
